name: Dataset Staging To Scratch
summary: Stage inputs to scratch, run work, and collect outputs from Slurm jobs.
description: This skill provides a conservative Slurm staging wrapper that copies declared inputs to a job scratch directory, runs a workload there, and copies selected outputs back to durable storage.

inputs.name: input_manifest
inputs.description: Newline-delimited list of files or directories to stage into scratch.

inputs.name: output_dir
inputs.description: Durable user-owned directory where selected outputs are collected.

outputs.name: staged_inputs
outputs.description: Inputs copied into job scratch for local access.

outputs.name: collected_outputs
outputs.description: Selected outputs copied back to durable storage.

outputs.name: staging_log
outputs.description: Log of stage-in, work, and stage-out steps.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Run with a tiny user-owned input manifest on a short debug partition and confirm outputs return to durable storage.
